rationale_overall: Watchlist is at cap (5/5) with one ticker per profile-named wave: NVDA (AI core), URA (nuclear miners), RKLB (rockets/spacecraft), LNG (geopolitical-energy), BOTZ (robotics). All five remain thesis-aligned through Q3 2024: NVDA's August FY25 Q2 print confirmed Hopper demand intact; URA benefits from the May 2024 US ban on Russian uranium imports and continued SMR-utility interest; RKLB's Electron launch cadence and Neutron progress remain on track; Cheniere's European LNG offtake is durable even as spot prices normalize off 2022 highs; BOTZ rides the industrial-automation and humanoid-robotics narratives building through 2024. Quantum is the one named wave not yet represented, but at cap=5 adding it would require ejecting a thesis-aligned holding, and no current holding has deteriorated enough to justify removal this quarter. Hold.
